%-----------SUMMARY-----------
\section{Summary}
\small{
Frontend Developer with \textbf{4+ years} of experience delivering high-performance \textbf{React.js} and \textbf{Next.js} applications for \textbf{enterprise} and \textbf{government} platforms. Reduced page load times by \textbf{30\%}, improved Lighthouse scores by \textbf{25\%}, and cut bundle size by \textbf{35\%} through \textbf{Performance Optimization}, \textbf{Webpack}, and modern \textbf{JavaScript (ES6+)} practices. Expert in \textbf{TypeScript}, \textbf{Redux}, \textbf{RESTful APIs}, \textbf{WCAG 2.1}, and \textbf{Agile/Scrum} delivery.
}
